untranslatable_reason: Signal requires regime-specific volume thresholds and conditional logic (heavy volume preferred in bull markets for up/down breakouts; light volume preferred in bear markets for down breakouts). No single condition set can capture this context-dependent switching behavior without explicit regime detection and conditional branching not supported by the rule engine syntax.
translation_notes: Translated base logic: heavy volume on breakout (volume > hvol_20) with price breakout (close > prev_high for long, close < prev_low for short). Exit on volume contraction. However, the original signal's performance variance by market regime (bull/bear) and breakout direction cannot be fully expressed without multi-branch conditional logic. hvol_20 approximates 'heavy volume' vs light volume baseline.
